header.subtitle: Clinical Data Review Solution — Demo Hub

hero.title: AI-Powered Clinical Data Review Platform
hero.description: Explore three interactive demos of Perficient's Clinical Data Repository & Review Solution — from autonomous AI agents and natural-language concierge to self-service visualization whiteboards. All modules work together on a unified, GxP-compliant data foundation.

modules.title: AI Clinical Operations Agents
modules.description: Autonomous agents execute complex multi-step clinical workflows — discrepancy triage, study setup validation, database readiness assessments — with real-time audit trails and reviewer queues. No manual intervention required.

modules.title: Data Management Concierge
modules.description: Natural-language AI interface for data managers and medical reviewers — query study data conversationally, surface safety signals, generate patient narratives, and trigger discrepancy workflows without SQL or programmer support.

modules.title: Clinical Data Whiteboard
modules.description: Self-service visualization canvas with drag-and-drop widgets, subject-level drill-down, RELREC cross-domain linking, and live data refresh — no programmer tickets, no waiting. Build study views in minutes.

footer: About these demos: All demos share a common synthetic clinical dataset (Study ABC-2024-001, Phase 3). Data is illustrative only — generated for demonstration purposes. Each demo represents a distinct module of the TrialClarity Clinical Data Review Solution. For engagement inquiries, contact Prabha.Ranganathan@perficient.com.
